untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formation pattern requires visual/geometric detection of expanding upper and lower trend lines with multiple touch points. This cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (RSI, MACD, Moving Averages, etc.). Pattern detection requires: (1) trend line slope calculation across multiple bars, (2) identification of minor highs/lows touching trend lines, (3) measurement of expanding distance between trend lines over time. None of these geometric measurements are available in the allowed indicator set. Volume trending up via linear regression is partially translatable, but the core pattern logic is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the volume confirmation aspect (volume trending up) using volume > sma_20 as a proxy. Entry direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Exit conditions defaulted to moving average crossover reversal since AUTHOR_SILENT. Average decline of 15% suggests risk/reward suitable for 5% stop loss. Formation typically develops over weeks/months, estimated 120 day hold max. This translation captures only peripheral conditions and should not be used without proper broadening formation pattern detection logic implemented separately.
